svg.text: OrderFlow — Distributed E-Commerce Order Processing Platform
React 18 + Spring Boot 3 (Java 17) + Apache Kafka + PostgreSQL + Redis · Saga pattern · Deployed on AWS EC2 via Docker Compose

g.text: Shop · Cart · Checkout · Order Tracking · History
Pipeline · Revenue · Failures · Kafka Lag · Health
JWT auth · routing · rate limiting (100 req/min) · request logging

svg.text: MICROSERVICES (Spring Boot · Java 17 · Maven multi-module reactor)
EVENT BUS — APACHE KAFKA (6 partitions/topic · manual offset commit · idempotent consumers)
Compensating transactions reverse partial work without 2-phase commit · idempotency keys prevent duplicate processing

g.text: All 13 containers run on one AWS EC2 instance via Docker Compose · Frontend :3000 · Gateway :8080
